data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for external directory links to internal users/subjects.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding external directory links to internal users/subjects. However, the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes but do not address the need for external directory links, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: External directory links to internal users/subjects are not validated or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for external directory links.
